mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_FILE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_FILE (file_number, file_name, file_original_name, file_extension, file_size, file_path) VALUES (#{fileNumber}, #{fileName}, #{fileOriginalName}, #{fileExtension}, #{fileSize}, #{filePath})
mapper.select: SELECT file_number AS fileNumber, file_name AS fileName, file_original_name AS fileOriginalName, file_extension AS fileExtension, file_size AS fileSize, file_path AS filePath FROM UB_FILE WHERE file_number = #{fileNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE UB_FILE SET file_name = #{fileName}, file_original_name = #{fileOriginalName}, file_extension = #{fileExtension}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_path = #{filePath} WHERE file_number = #{fileNumber}
